expected_behaviors: Recognizes the meeting is running over the 15-minute standup time box
Attempts to redirect long discussions with 'let's take that offline'
Time-boxes participants who speak for more than 2 minutes
Manages the speaker queue via kutana_get_queue_status
Posts summary even if the standup ran long
anti_patterns: Allows the meeting to run without any time management
Does not prompt participants to wrap up
Abandons facilitation because the meeting is off-format
Takes detailed notes instead of managing flow
